---
description: Plain notes accidentally dropped in a workflows/ directory.
---
# Just some notes

This file does not have the "# Workflow: <title>" / "## Step: <title>" /
"### Instructions" structural shape `looksLikeWorkflow` requires. Used by
`workflow-adapter.test.ts` to exercise the flagged Form-A conjunction (dir
position alone is NOT enough — the content probe must also pass).
